entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufactoring: Partial Confirmation possi...
entry.content:
Hello Patrick,

you have to activate the quantity field in the POD designer on the SFC card. You can then enter the quantity you want to confirm in the POD.

If I understood you correctly.

BR

Marcus

entry.title: [Webinar]Monitor Integration Health with SAP Cloud ALM’s Integration & Exception Monitoring (Korean)

SAP Cloud ALM Technical and Configuration Deep Dive 2025 

We are thrilled to extend a warm welcome to everyone for our SAP Cloud ALM technical and configuration deep dive webinar series.

Proactively Monitor SAP and Non-SAP Integration Health with SAP Cloud ALM’s Integration & Exception Monitoring (Korean)

entry.title: Re: Integrating ECC with S/4HANA
entry.content: @Edrilan_Berisha thanks for your answer, I asked question about integrating ECC with S/4HANA and you are replying with what first link returned by google. Could you please help with question asked?

entry.title: Re: 🧰👷‍♂️ The SAP S/4HANA RISE & SAP BTP - Toolbox 👷‍♂️🧰
entry.content:
When we (The Customer side Basis Team)  receive an SAP System from SAP ECS RISE Basis Team, we need to check the system and make sure that it is set up as intended and contains everything that was expected, let's call it a post delivery inspection.

This comment will be the placeholder for all of the "Basis" checks we do on a SAP System delivered by SAP ECS RISE Basis Team as the Post Delivery Inspection before we do the "Post Installation". ["Post Installation" will be in the next comment]....

The Post Delivery Inspection steps will begin in an agnostic foundation way enabling checking of any SAP System, S/4, S/4 Foundation, and subsequently will consider checks for systems like GRC (AC 12 on S/4HANA), GTS, aATP, EWM, TM, MDG, etc....

.

entry.title: Maximum number of 0000999 rules reached Message No. KD032, can i increase it.
entry.content:
Hello Sir, I am in S4Hana system, in tcode - cj02 getting error Maximum number of 0000999 rules reached

Message No. KD032, 

i want to increase 999 limit, please guide.

entry.title: Re: Attributes-to-Sap for Excel
entry.content: Hello Nazif, the EXCEL attribute exchange (file properties to SAP metadata fields) works different than the exchange for CAD tools. Can you describe in more detail what you would like to achieve? I haven't understood this yet. Regards, Gerhard

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to download the DME tree
entry.content: Okay, thanks for your response and valuable time Jeremy.

entry.title: Extracting Data Through CDS Views to SAP BW/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello there lovely SAP Community, 

Id like to integrate SAP BW/4HANA with S/4 hana public cloud and found the following todo on the s/4 hana public cloud platform: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/7d2bae1d9f2643c3bbaa398df8256c01.html?locale=en-US

According to this Guide i have to Create a Communication Arrangement with the ID: "SAP_COM_0042". Unfortunatly this Arrangement is unavaiable for me. I also dont find it in api.sap.com , nor any further information. 

My Question: What scope item does the communication Arrangement "SAP_COM_0042" comes along with? Or do i miss any point? Is there a better integration guide that i have missed? 

 

Thanks a lot for your support!

 

Kind regards, 

Philipp

entry.title: How to Read Data In Mass Process/Consolidation Using Validation BADI MDG
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We got a simple requirement to read company code is initial or not based on Customer roles (FLCU00) , For Single Process its working as expected using IT_DATA ( Reading roles) and using READ_CHAR_VALUE ( Read Company Code exist or not)

But for Mass Process we are unable to fetch Company code using READ_CHAR_VALUE  during validation step of Consolidation.

Any solution?

entry.title: Re: Trigger event and Receive event don't work in Data Variables Logic Canvas
entry.content:
Hi @Josephrezende 
Can you please try to move the Set App variable node immediately after the event trigger in the logic canvas, I guess if it's followed up after another process that might be causing the issue.

entry.title: Re: IBP Calculation with kf which is stored and calculate
entry.content:
Hi @Olli76,

 

The scope of the request is to use the logic of KF AOP (if it's blank use KF Head of Sales, if it's not blank use the value of AOL) in the KF3 calculation? If that is correct, then the request is simple : you need to make sure that in the KF3 calculation you are calling the calculated values of AOP (edit - inputs - select calculated values of KF AOP).

If my assumption is not correct feel free to provide an example. 

 

Regards, 

Andrei

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio for Governance, Risk and Compliance (GRC)
entry.content: Great and highly valuable post @joshuanganyadi do you have any updated in this area considering the SAP product roadmap?

entry.title: How to Link a Public Dimension to another dimension in a model.
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’ve created a Public Dimension in SAP Analytics Cloud and would like to link it to a dimension in another model (e.g., linking Customer_ID in my model to the public dimension).

How can I do this properly? Are there any specific steps or requirements I should follow?

Any tips or documentation links would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks,
Huzaifa

entry.title: S4 Readiness Checker report out of BW7.5 System - Forbidden Object Found - Error messages ..
entry.content:
We are just about to start our S4 journey and are in the initial phase of preparatory checks and readiness stages.

One of the thing that was carried out was running a S4 Readiness check for our BW system which has thrown up a myriad of errors in various areas of BW such as Update rules, transformations, process chains, DTPs to name a few.

A very common theme behind the vast majority of error is the use of objects that were allowed in BW 7.5 but  are forbidden in the world of S4.

A few examples of these errors are ( there are a few 100s of these types of forbidden errors):

  • Code FUNC: Found match(es) of forbidden object FUNC CONVERT_TO_STAT_CURRENCY.
  • Code PROG: Found match(es) of forbidden object PROG RSBCTGLS_INCL_GLOBAL_SPEND.
  • Code TABL: Found match(es) of forbidden object TABL GLS_CNT_REDEL.
  • Code DTEL: Found match(es) of forbidden object DTEL SR_VE_GNLOCATIO.

In spite of numerous searches online, I am unable to figure out the fixes to these type of errors should be. If an  BW object is forbidden in S4, then is there a replacement object for it in S4 ? Is there a composite OSS note  that gives a list of possible replacements by code type ? What approach should be take to resolve these errors. Our first step at getting ready for S4 to convert every single 3.x Update rule to 7.x transformation.  But before we do that I would like to know how we are supposed to handle these forbidden objects errors. 

Am sure we are not the first ones to have encountered this. So please if anyone could give me some sort of steer in the right direction to tackle these messages , that would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Treating Business Goals as "Individual" Goals possible?
entry.content:
@xavierlegarrec  maybe I was wrong or explaining little bit wrong. Its not really a weightage of goals or goal sections, its more the weightage of payout. I will give an example:

 

For easier comparison I used 100k as salary: Salary 100.000€, Target percentage 10% -> Target Amount 10.000€

These 10.000€ are now split into two parts: a) Billable Hours and b) Goal Achievement (in total). These two parts (a) and (b) can now differ in weightage of their payout. It can be (a)= 50% & (B)= 50% of target (5000 & 5000) or maybe (a)= 70% (b)=30% (7000 & 3000). This split is determined at the beginning of each year and differs from employee to employee.  

There are no additional (or corporate) goals to be considered. 

What I was thinking of was something like having the billable hours part as custom fields (of course theres some calculation for overfulfilment and so on) and the goals from PMGM as indivudual goals. I calculate the 10.000 into two parts according to their weightage (i.e. 70/30) and multiply each part it with its achievement percentage from billable or goals and add them togehter for payout.

Quick remark: Billable hours, billable achievement and "payout split" -> available in CompInfo

Is something like this feasible?

Thank you!

Michael

entry.title: Re: 物料主数据中的销售文本如何批量维护？
entry.content: 我已经找到方法了，可以用数据迁移的方式来批量维护。谢谢！

entry.title: Re: dunning notice generated but spool is in error
entry.content:
Read those KBA related to ADS

  • 3021558 - Error "Unable to call core function READFILE: SY-SUBRC = 16"
  • 3198587 - Error "Unable to call core function READFILE: SY-SUBRC = 16"(2)

entry.title: Re: Deliv.Rel. Billg Sts field in SO
entry.content:
Hello @KhaingZinTun 

For SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the field you want is “Deliv.Rel. Billg Sts”—is available via the released CDS view:

 I_SalesOrderItem

    Publicly released CDS view accessible via the View Browser or Custom CDS Views app.

    Contains the field BillingStatusCode, which corresponds to the “Delivery‑Related Billing Status” you’re seeing in Fiori

Steps to Validate

  •     Open View Browser in your Public Cloud tenant.
  •     Search for and preview I_SalesOrderItem.

    Verify that BillingStatusCode is present. It holds values like

  •         A = Not invoiced
  •         B = Partially invoiced
  •         C = Fully invoiced

These status values align with what Fiori displays as “Deliv.Rel. Billg Sts”    .

 Summary Table

Requirement

Public Cloud Solution

Field “Deliv.Rel. Billg Sts”

BillingStatusCode in I_SalesOrderItem

Access tools

View Browser or Custom CDS Views app

Valid values

A / B / C (Not / Partially / Fully invoiced)

 Next Steps

  •     Open View Browser → I_SalesOrderItem → verify BillingStatusCode.
  •     You can optionally create a Custom CDS View, select this field, and publish it for use in Fiori reports or analytic tiles.

SAP help reference:

CDS Views for Sales

Thank you and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Scenario Datasphere and SAC Story, dynamic valuelist...
entry.content:
hi martin,

 

thx for your answer.

but how possible to populate the drop-down during the start of the story? . 

in App  i could run the script before in "On _Startup" and populate the drop down with this script.

in story there's no "on_startup" event anmyore , so i can't run the script during the start of the story     

 

br Oliver

entry.title: Re: Out-of-the-Box Document Grounding in SAP AI Core: RAG with SAP Help Portal
entry.content:
hi @sshrey14 , kindly check again your API format (i.e. the baseUrl, authorization token); it should look like below when you generate the code snippet like curl.

curl --location 'https://api.ai.prod.ap-southeast-2.aws.ml.hana.ondemand.com/v2/lm/document-grounding/retrieval/dataRepositories' \
--header 'AI-Resource-Group: grounding' \
--header 'Accept: application/json' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer ey...wreqweq'

I have tested both postman and curl against my AI Core service again, it's working fine.
Best regards,
Joni Liu

entry.title: Taking online exam with seperate device for webcam
entry.content: I want to take an exam for a certification but my current computer doesn't have a webcam, would I be able to instead use my phone with zoom installed on it as the webcam and then complete the exam on my computer or does it have to all be in one machine?

entry.title: Re: Assigned a task list to an operation. TL contains a P...
entry.content:
Greetings,

you should be able to see the measurment points while performing confirmations. It is possible to post measuring documents for measuremnt points for the reference technical object and for measurment points assigned as PRT to operation in task list. 

I have prepared two equipments:

  • 10006100
  • 210100081

Both of them have two measuiring points as shown in picture below:

I have created a tsk list for equipment 210100081. This task list includes two operations. Second operation has assigned equipment 10006100 with measuing points 136 and 137 to it. 

I have created a maintenance order into which I have inluded the prepared task list. While performing a confirmation in IW42 I am able to post measuiring documents for all measuirng points:

  1. MEASUING POINTS FROM REFERENCE OBJECT
  2. MEASUING POINTS ASSIGNED AS PRODUCTION RESOURCES AND TOOLS

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: Attributes-to-Sap for Excel
entry.content:
Hello Gerhard,

Exactly what I am trying to do is as in the picture.

Best regards

Nazif Kara

entry.title: Common issues in SAP Joule Activation in SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Common Issues in SAP Joule activation for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

 This blog is continuation of our comprehensive setup blog. In last several months, we helped multiple customers in activating Joule for their S/4 HANA Private Cloud systems  and in this blog we will compile all the common issues we faced and it's potential fix and workaround. 

  1. Issue: Joule refused to connect after the launch from S/4 HANA Fiori launchpad.

 

Reason: Trusted domain configuration not done.

Fix:  Add the Fiori launchpad URL (Host details) in both IAS-> Tenant configuration and BTP Trust settings. Please note that the trusted domain might take some time to take effect. Please retry launching Joule after 15-20 minutes in private browsing window. 

  

Screenshots

    

 

 

  1. Issue: Error occurred “Digital Assistant not found”.

Reason: S/4 HANA system is not added in the global account system formation.

Fix: Delete the existing formation for joule in BTP global account. In case of any error in formation creation, create a ticket with the component BC-CP-MP.

Screenshots

 

 

  1. Issue: Content provider synchronization fails with unauthorized error.

Reason:

  1. The user credential is invalid.
  2. The user is not having enough roles.
  3. Cloud connector version is > 2.15 and principal type “None” or “Use system certificate checkbox is checked”

Fix:

  1. Check and ensure the user credential is correct in DT destination.
  2. Ensure the user has SAP_FLP_ADMIN and SAP_FLP_EXP_USER roles.
  3. In the cloud connector make sure that the principal type is selected as “X.509 certificate”

Screenshots

 

 

 

 

 

 

Solution screenshot in cloud connector:

 

 

  1. Issue: Editing in IPS transformation, adding additional parameter failed with unspecified error.

Reason: Source / Target transformation contains error.

Fix: Copy the latest transformation from https://help.sap.com/docs/JOULE/6189c8655c484916bb8eb767126a653a/a6cf317ecede4fa78c57be07219cee1a.html?version=CLOUD

 

Screenshots

 

 

  1. Issue: Transactional query fetches informational / navigational result.

Reason: It can be due to many issues which may include the following.

  1. User doesn’t have the required roles for the transactional queries.
  2. OData service required by the transactional scenario is not active.
  3. Check the content provider configuration.
  4. Issue with the principal propagation setup.

Fix:

  1. Check the business roles required by the given transactional queries from the SAP Note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3523238 and ensure the user has the required roles. In case using the custom roles, ensure the required semantic objects and action are available in the custom roles.
  2. Check the status of the OData services as given in the above note and ensure they are active.
  3. Additionally, you can check the runtime destination for dynamic data in the content provider has the PCE SSO destination.
  4. Verify the principal propagation setup and check the cloud connector log, ICM log to perform troubleshooting.

 

Screenshots

The below screenshot depicts the resolution 3.

 

  1. Issue: Joule icon is not showing up in S/4 HANA Fiori launchpad after all the configurations.

Reason:

  1. User is not having the role which contains the business catalogue for Joule plug-in.
  2. Cache issue.
  3. 3rd party cookie is blocked by the browser setting.
  4. Fiori customizing is causing conflict with configuration.

 

Fix:

  1. Ensure that the user has the “Single Role” which contains the Fiori business catalogue.
  2. Clear the browser cache. Also, we can try invalidating the server cache by executing the program: /UI2/INVALIDATE_GLOBAL_CACHES
  3. Allow the 3rd party cookie in the browser setting.
  4. Use T-code: /UI2/FLC to check the launchpad content first with the setting “Configuration” and if no error appeared then run it for “Customizing”.

Check the following SAP Help documentation for more information:

 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIORI_OVERVIEW/47d8a2e60bf2442c8e0675961953eef6/21484a647f9f4563942da3e846b5cc33.html

 

Screenshots

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

  1. Issue: launching joule ends up in error “Corp IDP” refused to connect.

Reason: It can happen due to multiple reasons. The most common we have seen is, the S/4 HANA Fiori launchpad is directly connected to corporate IDP (Microsoft Azure in this example) without having SAP Cloud Identity service as proxy.

Fix: It’s recommended by SAP to always use the same Cloud identity services tenant in Fiori launchpad which has been used with the BTP for Joule.

Screenshots

 

 

  1. Issue: Error in adding the Build work zone and IAS in formation after running Joule booster.

Reason:  The Identity authentication is not enabled in SAP Build work zone.

Fix: Enable the Identity authentication in SAP Build work zone.

Screenshots

 

 

  1. Issue: Cloud connector is not able to connect subaccount with Cloud connector

     

 

Fix: Download the authentication data from sub account and upload it in cloud connector, it’ll connect.

Thanks to my colleagues in @Diganta_Mandal @nageshcaparthy and others in AI RIG, AI Factory and Product teams. 

We will update this blog as we face more common setup issues.

entry.title: Re: Extracting Data Through CDS Views to SAP BW/4HANA
Re: Business Partner Custom Event from an SAP Standard Event in S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi Rehan,

Great showcase of possibilities!

I tried to create scenario with Business Partner on S4H on prem 2023. Derived event works in terms of payload extended, but filter is not showing in outbound binding. 

i tried many things:

- delete topic, add topic

- clear cache of channel in /IWXBE/R_CACHE_CLEANUP

- do some changes in data view, BDEF extension, Event binding and activate again

- add @Metadata.allowExtensions: true , but this is rather needed only for standard data view

here is my CDS:

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'Data definition for BP'

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

@ObjectModel.usageType:{

serviceQuality: #X,

sizeCategory: #S,

dataClass: #MIXED

}

 

define view entity ZMP_BusinessPartner_DD2 as select from I_BusinessPartner

{

key BusinessPartner,

@event.context.attribute: 'xsapfirstname'

FirstName,

LastName,

SearchTerm1,

BusinessPartnerCategory,

BusinessPartnerUUID

} where FirstName = 'Bernd 3'

entry.title: Re: Extracting Data Through CDS Views to SAP BW/4HANA
entry.content:
found it: 

 

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2502/SolP/35D?region=DE

 

its 35D

 

kind regards

Chanaporn S.

entry.title: Re: Accounting: Questions on Depreciation Asset Tax Retur...

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Live Connection Error to S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to create live connection between our S/4HANA Cloud ERP and SAC systems. Although we have tracked the steps in below help document, we got "We couldn't connect to your S/4 HANA system. " error message with log "Live Data connection .... does not exist".  WE couldn't find the missing part, can you help us on that?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/0485d540e0b340a0bc0da86fe368997c.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: limitations of SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) when it come...
entry.content:
Hi Ujjani

I am not sure I can answer in detail to your questions, but here are a few elements:

1) & 2) There are different levels where you can carry out calculations in SAP analytics cloud:

  • The modeler
  • The story (a.k.a. report in WebI) at the object level
  • The table front end (predefined aggregations)

You can check a list of available ones.

3) Yes, you can schedule publications for an output in .pdf .csv & .pptx. You can check the possibilities here. It is not yet as powerful as BOE scheduling.

Regarding the treillis, you can leverage linked analysis feature to dynamically filter/explore various visualizations.

Hope this helps!

Greg

entry.title: Supply area is WM managed but not extended for EWM Production Supply Area
entry.content:
Hi,

To manage material supply to production, we use SAP NJIT – Supply to Production.

When creating control cycles for a specific material, I also define the Production Supply Area and the Destination Storage Bin where the material should be delivered. However, I receive the following error message:

"Supply area is WM managed but not extended for EWM - Production Supply Area"

Any support or guidance on resolving this issue would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance,
Fabian

entry.title: SAP Enable Now
entry.content: What is the future of SAP Enable Now? Is there any roadmap with SAP for combining SAP Enable Now and WalkMe in future because there are components of Enable Now that are not available through WalkMe, e.g. the digital learning content such Books and Book Pages and Simulations.

entry.title: Re: 通过项目管理在建工程，就是创建了投资项目后，并且勾选了向下结构传递，一个项目也创建了不同阶段的wbs要素分解，帮助文档中说明，向下机构传递勾选后，其余运行会采用主项目结算规则，然后运行期末结算
entry.content: Hello, thank you very much for your contribution. Could you please let us know whether you wanted to publish this information as a blog or what your question is? Thank you very much. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi @beatebea ,

You can't log into Joule with your S/4 HANA user name and Password. However, you can definitely have seamless Joule experience without having to double log on, if you have SSO setup between your S/4 HANA and Cloud Identity services. 

You must use the same CIS tenant for S/4 and BTP. 

 

Best regards,

Samir

entry.title: Re: BDCQ - Finance - Needs to be in sync with SAP Best Practice Scope Items List
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Employment Status in Story reports
entry.content: Both the options suggested by you enabled correctly still issue is there in my instance .

entry.title: Re: Add Custom Context Attributes for SAP Released Event Types
entry.content:
Hi Safa,

The same for me, in S4H ON PREM 2023 there is no "allowExtension" for D_SalesOrderCreated

Another question - is it possible to add filter for standard Business Partner event ? BDEF: I_BUSINESSPARTNERTP_2 ?

Best regards

Mateusz

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi @Rattasak ,

You can remove the UUID condition from the target transformation JSON. Just have "condition": "($.emails EMPTY false). 

Best regards,

Samir

entry.title: SAP DM: Integration Scenario with Stock Room Management?
entry.content:
Hello,

where can i find reliable information about possible integration possibilities with SAP WM / Stock Room Management. EWM is on the roadmap but only in a few years. Is there sth, that can be enabled with ECC / WM including staging with WM TO? and then use this 1:1 in S4/Stockroom Managament? Scenarios like Staging 2.0 are only with EWM possible and slides i could find mention only "IM" and use rough stocks in storage locations.

 

I appreciate expert input and thoughts here.

 

br

Patrick

entry.title: Re: RFOPENPOSTING_FR functionality
entry.content:
Hi @prasadgarude90 

RFOPENPOSTING_FR is basically a legal requirement in France for tax audit reporting.

It can be used for many other balance sheet accounts and not just Customer and Vendor reconciliation accounts. but this is used only for Open item management balance sheet accounts.

Its mostly used for reconciliation accounts because they require open item tracking but it can be used for other balance sheet open item accounts which are require open item tracking. 

I hope this answers your query.

 

 

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 Fully-Activated Appliance: Known Issues
entry.content:
Hi, i am having issues installing the 2023 FPS03 Edition. The installation stops at the first step after the extraction of the archives. 

After /hana/shared/HDB/hdblcm/hdblcm --action=register_rename_system

I get an error: 

16:08:51.789 - ERR :   Renaming instance failed
16:08:51.789 - ERR : Renaming master failed!
16:08:51.789 - ERR : Renaming SAP HANA instance failed!
16:08:51.807 - INFO: -----------------------------------------------------------
16:08:51.807 - INFO: Cleaning up configuration changes...
16:08:51.807 - INFO: -----------------------------------------------------------
16:08:51.807 - INFO:   Checking for any auto-failover settings disabled by the SAP HANA Lifecycle Management...
16:08:51.807 - INFO:     Getting nameserver.ini
16:08:51.807 - INFO:       Reading nameserver.ini
16:08:51.807 - INFO:         Layer 'Default' found
16:08:51.809 - INFO:         Layer 'System' found
16:08:51.809 - INFO:   No auto-failover settings disabled by the SAP HANA Lifecycle Management were found.
16:08:51.809 - INFO: -----------------------------------------------------------
16:08:51.809 - INFO: END: Cleaning up configuration changes (start: 16:08:51.807 duration: 00:00:00)
16:08:51.809 - INFO: -----------------------------------------------------------
16:08:51.809 - INFO: Summary of critical errors
16:08:51.789 - ERR :   Renaming SAP HANA instance failed!
16:08:51.789 - ERR :     Renaming master failed!
16:08:51.789 - ERR :       Renaming instance failed

The logs don't show any more. Could it be broken archives or missing files in the archives?

Best regards, 

Sascha

entry.title: Re: 通过项目管理在建工程，就是创建了投资项目后，并且勾选了向下结构传递，一个项目也创建了不同阶段的wbs要素分解，帮助文档中说明，向下机构传递勾选后，其余运行会采用主项目结算规则，然后运行期末结算
entry.content: 想要知道如何处理这个问题，将所有的子项目，期末结算时转到同一个在建工程，如何处理 ？感谢您的帮助与指导

entry.title: Re: My Intro
entry.content:
Hi Aditi, Welcome!

Where are you based in? You can look for your city in Location Groups and join the one that is the closest to you^^

You can also check out Managed Tags and follow the topics that you are interested in. Have fun 🙂

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM - Business Service Management strategy
entry.content:
Hello Raja,
The Business Service Management will help you to group your systems (and cloud services) into business services which can be understand by the business users.
It provides the possibility to offer a different view apart from the technical landscape definition (like a 4-tier landscape) - to represent business functionality rather then transport routes for example. 
You can find more information on our SAP Cloud ALM Expert Portal for Business Service Management here.
Let me know if this answers your question. 
best regards,
Romy
SAP Support

entry.title: [Webinar] Business Service Management and Intelligent Event Processing in SAP Cloud ALM (Korean)
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM Technical and Configuration Deep Dive 2025 

We are thrilled to extend a warm welcome to everyone for our SAP Cloud ALM technical and configuration deep dive webinar series.

Topic

Driving Efficiency: Business Service Management and Intelligent Event Processing in SAP Cloud ALM (Korean)

Agenda

  • SAP Cloud ALM Overview - 5 min
  • Driving Efficiency: Business Service Management and Intelligent Event Processing in SAP Cloud ALM - 50 mins
  • Q&A - 5 mins

Register Now

We look forward to seeing you virtually!

Stay updated on upcoming sessions!

For any further queries please contact us on cloudalm@sap.com

 

If you have any questions about the session topic, please feel free to post them in the comments.

entry.title: Error with transporting assignment of BP Identification Category to Identification Type
entry.content:
Dear Community,

in our Public Cloud Implementation Project, we would like to assign a customized Business Partner Identification Category to a BP Identification Type.

Identification Categories have been customized. Transport from customizing to test system in public cloud has been done via Export Software Collection. By releasing the software collection in its specific app, the transport is immediately available in the test system and ready to be imported.

Afterwards, we assign the Identification Category to an Identification Type. This setting has to be stored in a customizing transport.  Subsequently, the customizing transport has to be released in order to transport it to the test system. This is not working due to dependencies to the settings, that had to be stored in the software collection.

 

Does anyone of you know how to overcome the issue? A Ticket has already been raised.

 

Many thanks in advance and kind regards

Talke

entry.title: Re: Story Report for Goal Management
entry.content: Hi Punita, It's not clear from your description what you are doing, you could add it as column, or a filter etc. Not clear what your query looks like, which joins are there. I'd recommend you to share more info and some screenshots. Additionally, also check if you have the right permissions to see Goal management with all plans/templates, sometimes the absence of data is caused by permissions

entry.title: Re: Can you tell me the view where I can check the BP Mas...
entry.content: Thank you. I found what I was looking for in I_BusinessPartnerIndustry and I_CreditManagementBP.

entry.title: Re: SAP -Generative AI
entry.content:
Hi @MohanMujumale - Transparency is key when it comes to AI,  I have therefore added the "GenAI Assisted Content" user tag to your post, according to our Rules of Engagement: "If you want to publish content that was helped/created by GenAI, you must add the user tag GenAI Assisted Content. For content where it's not possible to add a user tag (e.g., answers), you must include this statement: "GenAI was used to help generate this content."

The post in its current form is also too short. 
We expect every blog post to consist of a beginning (introduction), a middle (main portion), and an end (a conclusion that wraps everything up). A collection of links or just a video with short text does not qualify as a blog post. You can find more information about writing blog posts in our FAQ.

entry.title: Re: Employment Status in Story reports
entry.content: Hi Punita, Grey "Status" in Basic User Information looks like 100% permission issue. You can check it, if you switch on "Unconditional access to the data" in the Reporting section in your role and then have access to that field in the report, that would mean that you lacked some permission for sure. Second option is to use "Employment status" dimension from Job information for filtering where you need to exclude "Terminated"

entry.title: Re: RFOPENPOSTING_FR functionality
entry.content: This application creates opening entries for every 'balance sheet accounts' (not for P&L)

entry.title: Re: How do I know if SAP Cash Management is activated?
entry.content:
Hello @Gabor5 ,

Please check out the list below for scope items related to cash management: 


BFABasic Bank Account Management
BFBBasic Cash Operations
J77Advanced Bank Account Management
J78Advanced Cash Operations
2O0Bank Fee Management
2U8Intercompany Process for Cash Concentration
34PTreasury Workstation Cash Integration
3L5 Liquidity Planning

entry.title: 批量运行结算WBS
entry.content: 项目结算APP：运行结算 项目-实际（集中）显示已弃用，替代APP：运行结算 实际，仅支持单个执行，是否有其他批量结算的APP

entry.title: Re: Integrating ECC with S/4HANA

(It also depends on the version and type of HANA system: on-premise or cloud, private or public?)

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting with Chargeable Components
entry.content: It has already been confirmed in your other discussion that the said process will work only for one country.  If there is a need for other country, may be you can take the logic from SAP note 599396, test it thoroughly and take the concurrence from the Business Finance team. Needless to mention, some custom development would be required to validate the chargeable value of components being sent.

entry.title: Re: Analytics Cloud & Business ByDesign Business Content...
entry.content:
Hey, all. 

I've managed to solve this problem in the meantime. The issue had to do with our ByDesign configuration.

Steps to fix:
Business Analytics -> Design Reports
Search for relevant ID (e.g. SRMIV_B03_Q0011) and select
Click assign button
Then assign to Corporate Performance work center as highlighted in the screenshot below.

After the changes are saved, the table should now be visible when creating a query (make sure to refresh). Note that the predelivered imports will still provide an error due to a mapping failure. This is easily fixed by just copying the query, running it and then fixing the mapping imports there. Repeat these steps for all of the aforementioned problem tables/queries and the problem should be fixed.

There might be a better or more up to date way to solve this issue. If anyone knows it, please let me know. ByDesign isn't really my field of expertise.

entry.title: Re: CDS Table Entities - for On-Prem & Private Cloud
entry.content: Hi Austin, I am not aware of any information or help docs that SAP will deliver CDS Table entities in a 2023 FPS update.

entry.title: Re: New E-learning course on S/4HANA TM - core features, deployment options, migration and data volu
entry.content: subscription needed?

entry.title: SAP DM website does not open and produce an error: Too many redirects.
entry.content: When we trying to connect to the SAP DM website, we receive the error TOO MANY REDIRECTS. We do not know how to resolve this error. The site worked up to earlier this week.

entry.title: Re: CORUPROC transaction not clearing AFFW data
entry.content:
CORUPROC is a report used to reprocess goods movements that failed due to locking situations during the update process.

  • If you don't analyze and correct errors it will often not be able to correct the errors (only some lock / sequence errors should  be corrected)
  • Did you analyze the dumps (ST22) or error message (SM13), did you then look for OSS notes related to the root causes of dump ?
  • If you don't have performance issues, consider activation of the application log

entry.title: Re: On the Road to SAP BW/4HANA - first stage accomplished
entry.content:
@RolandKramer , First guidance on SAP BW on Hana link is not working, could you please check and re - update.

One of the customer is keen on In-place conversion from SAP BW 7.5 SP 30 on Oracle to SAP BW/4Hana.

As a first step and pre - requisite to move to BW/4Hana, BW should on HANA Database, we are planning for Hana Data base migration. Looking forward for the working link of First Guidance.

entry.title: Re: S4 Readiness Checker report out of BW7.5 System - For...
entry.content: Are you running a standalone BW (based on SAP Netweaver) or an embedded one (ERP/ECC)?

entry.title: Re: How to Use 'document-service' API to Upload Documents into Sales & Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Hi @manideepsatya 

Thank you for the blog. In our business scenario, we want to transfer the attachments within Case object to 3rd party system.

Our idea is to perform GET call of a Case --> Fetch the attachment ID --> the use document service to fetch the document details. However, we are stuck here and didn't know how to convert this Json to binary file, so that 3rd party system can receive as actual attachment.

In V1, we can get the binary data of the attachment and then can be converted to file as per the notes - https://me.sap.com/notes/0003371608

Can you guide us here how to transfer the attachment to the other system?

entry.title: Update sales order item route on save
entry.content:
Hello gurus,

My requirement is to update every sales order item route VBAP-ROUTE on the change in the header level :

 

I am using userexit USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE and I update table XVBAP[] (field ROUTE)

Everything is working fine but the schedule line dates are not updated !

 

If it's done manually :

 

 

How can I update schedule line dates programatically ?

entry.title: Re: unable to print preview pdf for PO
entry.content: Please check SAP notes or contact SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Can create the new Exchange Rate Type
entry.content:
Sawatdee khrap Chanaporn,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you cannot create a completely new exchange rate type.

 

Key Points:

  • Only predefined exchange rate types (like M, P, etc.) are allowed in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
  • These rate types are delivered by SAP and cannot be extended or customized to add new ones.
  • However, you can use the existing exchange rate types and assign different currency pairs, validity periods, and rates using the available configuration and apps.

 

Workaround options:

If your business needs different exchange rates for various purposes (e.g., planning vs. accounting), consider:

  • Using a different standard rate type (e.g., use M for accounting and P for planning).
  • Uploading rates regularly via apps like:
    • "Manage Exchange Rates"
    • "Import Exchange Rates"
    • Or by integration with SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) or an external market data provider.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: How to maintain the SOBES field for specific combinat...
entry.content:
The domain values/conversion of this field are maintained in the domain and table T460B, which has the following status: S – system table, edited only by SAP; change – modification.

(There are effectively no value 5 in my systems either. What would this value be used for, in which industry solution ?)

entry.title: Re: Error "Rule Service with given ID does not exist" when Consuming Decision Table API(SB
entry.content: Having the same issue right now - did you resolve it?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Google Chart Does Not Render Any More
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP Build Apps has stricter security and rendering sandboxing compared to AppGyver. D3.js or Google Charts may not render properly due to missing permissions or incompatible WebView behavior. Try embedding the chart in an iframe or use a custom WebView component. Also, ensure your scripts are loaded securely (HTTPS, CORS-compliant) and are not blocked by SAP Build’s runtime.

Feel free to check erproots.com (please apply a nofollow attribute if referencing).

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Can create the new Exchange Rate Type
entry.content:
Hi @Jeremy_Deo,

 I have test creating the new exchange rate type, and I can use it for recording Billing documents in the system.

If I manually create a new exchange rate type, will the configuration be lost after a system update release?

Please confirm.

Thanks,

Chanaporn S.

entry.title: Re: unable to see in HTML5 Application in SAP BTP COCKPIT...
entry.content: I created a new MTA with app srv and db and deployed to CF and can see the app in html5 app repository

entry.title: Re: Error "Rule Service with given ID does not exist" whe...
entry.content:
Hi,

This error typically means the deployed rule service (decision table) wasn't activated or the correct rule service ID wasn’t used in your Postman request. Double-check the following:

  1. Ensure the decision table is deployed successfully in the Build Process Automation Monitor.

  2. Use the correct Rule Service ID from the Monitor → Rule Service Details screen.

  3. Make sure you’re using the right tenant base URL and authorization token in Postman.

If recently deployed, try redeploying and regenerating the trigger—then test again.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: PPF message not always processed, stucked in SPPFP (S...
entry.content: We encounter the same Problem. My assumption was the number of dialogue work processes too low. But not sure. We are changing our program to post GI delivery by delivery not all of them in one go. Let's see whether it helps.

entry.title: Re: limitations of SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) when it come...
entry.content:
Hi,

  • Cell-Level Calculations: SAC has limited cell-level formula support. Unlike Webi’s flexible cell-specific logic, SAC uses model-based calculations and restricted formulas within tables or charts.

  • Webi Functions Equivalents:

    • Force Merge/Merge Dimensions: SAC doesn’t have a direct merge dimension feature. You need to model data properly beforehand or use linked models/blended data.

    • Where Conditions: You can simulate this using restricted measures or filters, though it’s less dynamic than Webi’s "Where" clause.

  • Publication Formats: SAC supports exporting to PDF and Excel. HTML export/publication is not natively supported like in Webi.

  • If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to Link a Public Dimension to another dimension i...
entry.content:
@Huzaifa2 I am not sure what exactly does linking your dimension to public dimension means here. The only link you can establish between 2 dimension is by using attribute where in one dimension members are attributes in other dimension. Even this relationship has to be done manually.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Error "Rule Service with given ID does not exist" whe...
entry.content: in my case, the Rule Service was configured within the Process Automation, so we cannot deploy / redeploy it manually. Do you have any recommendations on this?
